'''fongazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kebablike|kebablike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kebablike|kebablike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fongazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongazithi|fongazithi]] || [[word:fongaziji|fongaziji]] || [[word:fongazishi|fongazishi]] || [[word:fongaziki|fongaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongazuthuthu|fongazuthuthu]] || [[word:fongazujuju|fongazujuju]] || [[word:fongazushushu|fongazushushu]] || [[word:fongazukuku|fongazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongazuthu|fongazuthu]] || [[word:fongazuju|fongazuju]] || [[word:fongazushu|fongazushu]] || [[word:fongazuku|fongazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongazufthuf|fongazufthuf]] || [[word:fongazufjuf|fongazufjuf]] || [[word:fongazufshuf|fongazufshuf]] || [[word:fongazufkuf|fongazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongazethe|fongazethe]] || [[word:fongazeje|fongazeje]] || [[word:fongazeshe|fongazeshe]] || [[word:fongazeke|fongazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongazothotho|fongazothotho]] || [[word:fongazojojo|fongazojojo]] || [[word:fongazoshosho|fongazoshosho]] || [[word:fongazokoko|fongazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongazotho|fongazotho]] || [[word:fongazojo|fongazojo]] || [[word:fongazosho|fongazosho]] || [[word:fongazoko|fongazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongazofthof|fongazofthof]] || [[word:fongazofjof|fongazofjof]] || [[word:fongazofshof|fongazofshof]] || [[word:fongazofkof|fongazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongazïfthïf|fongazïfthïf]] || [[word:fongazïfjïf|fongazïfjïf]] || [[word:fongazïfshïf|fongazïfshïf]] || [[word:fongazïfkïf|fongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongazïfthïfthïf|fongazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:fongazïfjïfjïf|fongazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:fongazïfshïfshïf|fongazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:fongazïfkïfkïf|fongazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongazïfthïf|fongazïfthïf]] || [[word:fongazïfjïf|fongazïfjïf]] || [[word:fongazïfshïf|fongazïfshïf]] || [[word:fongazïfkïf|fongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongazïfthïf|fongazïfthïf]] || [[word:fongazïfjïf|fongazïfjïf]] || [[word:fongazïfshïf|fongazïfshïf]] || [[word:fongazïfkïf|fongazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fongazæthæ|fongazæthæ]] || [[word:fongazæjæ|fongazæjæ]] || [[word:fongazæshæ|fongazæshæ]] || [[word:fongazækæ|fongazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fongazathatha|fongazathatha]] || [[word:fongazajaja|fongazajaja]] || [[word:fongazashasha|fongazashasha]] || [[word:fongazakaka|fongazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fongazatha|fongazatha]] || [[word:fongazaja|fongazaja]] || [[word:fongazasha|fongazasha]] || [[word:fongazaka|fongazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fongazafthaf|fongazafthaf]] || [[word:fongazafjaf|fongazafjaf]] || [[word:fongazafshaf|fongazafshaf]] || [[word:fongazafkaf|fongazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fongazasha|fongazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongazshësha|fongazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongazrosha|fongazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongazmusha|fongazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongazyasha|fongazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongaznkshësha|gofongaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongaznkrosha|gofongaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongaznkmusha|gofongaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongaznkyasha|gofongaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fongangazasha|fongangazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongangazshësha|fongangazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongangazrosha|fongangazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongangazmusha|fongangazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongangazyasha|fongangazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongangaznkshësha|gofongangaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongangaznkrosha|gofongangaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongangaznkmusha|gofongangaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongangaznkyasha|gofongangaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fengæzasha|fengæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fengæzshësha|fengæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fengæzrosha|fengæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fengæzmusha|fengæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fengæzyasha|fengæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofengæznkshësha|gofengæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofengæznkrosha|gofengæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofengæznkmusha|gofengæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofengæznkyasha|gofengæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fongfazasha|fongfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fongfazshësha|fongfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fongfazrosha|fongfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fongfazmusha|fongfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fongfazyasha|fongfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofongfaznkshësha|gofongfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofongfaznkrosha|gofongfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofongfaznkmusha|gofongfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofongfaznkyasha|gofongfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
